title: Figure 3 from: He M-H, Luo X-Y, Habib K, Lu P-Z, Jin Y-L, Ashraf U, Li Q-R (2026) Multigene phylogenetic analyses and morpho-anatomical characterization revealed two new species of Xylariomycetidae from Yunnan, China. MycoKeys 127: 289-306. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.127.179422
author: He, Ming-Hui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3 Amphisphaeria zhaotongensis (GMB6412, holotype). A. Dead corticated host branch with immersed ascomata; B–D. Surface view of ascomata; E. Cross section of ascoma; F, G. Vertical section of ascomata; H. Peridium; I, J. Amyloid ascal apical apparatus (stained in Melzer's reagent); K. Paraphyses; L–O. Ascospores; P–R. Asci. Scale bars: 0.5 mm (D–F); 100 μm (G); 10 μm (H–R)
